productDisplayName: W Women Thread Work Green Kurta
description: Composition Green kurta made of 70% cotton and 30% viscose, has short sleeves, a boat neck, stitch detailing on the chest and sides and embroidery above the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
